name: DNSDB
description: This app supports investigative DNS lookup actions on DNSDB

actions.name: Check Rate Limit
actions.description: Get data of current data limit

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name to lookup

parameters.name: time_first_after
parameters.description: Record first seen after (epoch, relative seconds e.g. -31536000, or UTC timestamp e.g. 2021-01-05T12:06:02Z)

parameters.name: time_first_before
parameters.description: Record first seen before (epoch, relative seconds e.g. -31536000, or UTC timestamp e.g. 2021-01-05T12:06:02Z)

parameters.name: time_last_before

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max records to return
